hierarchy.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-7xl tracking-tighter font-black text-white
hierarchy.h2: text-3xl sm:text-4xl lg:text-5xl tracking-tight font-bold text-[#0A0A0A]

components.buttons: rounded-none border-2 border-[#C8102E] bg-[#C8102E] text-white hover:bg-white hover:text-[#C8102E] transition-colors font-bold uppercase tracking-widest px-8 py-4
components.product_card: group flex flex-col overflow-hidden bg-white hover:-translate-y-1 transition-transform duration-300. Image container MUST use bg-[#111111] (dark background) to seamlessly blend the dark cloth of the product photos. Product details (title, price, button) sit below on white background.
components.header: sticky top-0 z-50 bg-white/90 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-gray-100
components.badges: bg-[#C8102E] text-white uppercase text-xs font-bold tracking-wider px-3 py-1

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Buttons use harsh bg inversion. Product cards lift slightly with shadow. Links use red underline animation.

accessibility.contrast: Red (#C8102E) on White (#FFFFFF) is high contrast. Keep text size large enough.
accessibility.testing_attributes: Add data-testid to all interactive elements.

instructions_to_main_agent: Build standard React app with Tailwind CSS.
Construct standard e-commerce routes: Home, Shop, About, Contact, Admin.
For the hero banner, use a dark gradient overlay (e.g., bg-black/40) over the Eastern Sierra landscape so the white text and red accents pop.

CRITICAL: Product images have a dark cloth background. Ensure the image wrapper in the product card has a dark background (e.g., bg-[#111] or bg-black) to blend seamlessly with the image edges, acting as a dramatic frame.
Use Playfair Display for headings and Manrope for body text. Make sure fonts are imported via Google Fonts in index.html or global CSS.
Implement a mock Cart drawer (using Shadcn Sheet) and a Mock Checkout flow.
Admin page should allow adding, editing, and deleting products. Use simple local state or localStorage for data persistence during the session.
